##NAMES=Soddyite
##RRUFFID=R060361
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(UO_2_)_2_(SiO_4_)(H_2_O)_2_
##LOCALITY=Musonoi Extension, near Kolwezi, Shaba Province, Zaire
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Yellow pyramidal crystals associated with light green malachite and dark green brochantite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060361
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.32 b: 11.19 c: 18.65 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 1736 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
